rationale: The GLB iterator of (self, iter) is unique: case-split on whether iter is end or some specific iterator, and on the relative position of r1 vs r2; the gap+between conjunct of greatest_lower_bound_spec forbids the larger key from sitting strictly between the smaller glb and iter when glb equals iter, while the 'above' conjunct forbids it when both glbs are strictly below iter. Sorted+no_duplicates then forces r1 == r2.
